name: PT Ekamas Mora Republik Tbk - Mora-IXP (Data Center Interconnect)
name_long: PT Ekamas Mora Republik Tbk / Moratel International
notes:
Nusantara Data Center
---
Nusantara Data Center (NDC) is an Indonesia's largest and most respected Data Center Network trusted by government, ministries, state-owned enterprises, foreign and domestic large companies, telecommunication operators and ISPs in Indonesia.

NDC is an open and neutral data center for international and local multi-operators. NDCs are integrated into 5 Data Centers in Jakarta, Surabaya, Medan, Pelembang and Batam, within the Mora Internet eXchange Point (Mora IXP) network, and connected to Public Data Center and other Exchange-Point in Indonesia (Open-IXP, APJII, Technovillage, Cyber-Building, Cyber-CSF, IDC-D3, etc).

Total combines power: 3.3 megawatts.

Company Profile: https://as23947.peeringdb.com/
